member.name: T:AccountInfo
member.summary: Current information about an account, including the balance.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.AccountId
member.summary: The account ID for which this information applies.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.ContractAccountId
member.summary: The Contract Account ID comprising both the contract instance and the cryptocurrency account owned by the contract instance, in the format used by Solidity.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.IsDeleted
member.summary: If true, then this account has been deleted, it will disappear when it expires, and all transactions for it will fail except the transaction to extend its expiration date.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.ProxyAccountId
member.summary: The Account ID of the account to which this is proxy staked. If proxyAccountID is null, or is an invalid account, or is an account that isn't a node, then this account is automatically proxy staked to a node chosen by the network, but without earning payments. If the proxyAccountID account refuses to accept proxy staking , or if it is not currently running a node, then it will behave as if proxyAccountID was null.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.ProxyReceived
member.summary: The total proxy staked to this account.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.Key
member.summary: The key for the account, which must sign in order to transfer out, or to modify the account in any way other than extending its expiration date.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.Balance
member.summary: The current balance of account.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.SendRecordThreshold
member.summary: The threshold amount for which an account record is created (and this account charged for them) for any send/withdraw transaction.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.ReceiveRecordThreshold
member.summary: The threshold amount for which an account record is created (and this account charged for them) for any transaction above this amount.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.IsReceiverSigRequired
member.summary: If true, no transaction can transfer to this account unless signed by this account's key.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.ExpirationTime
member.summary: The time at which this account is set to expire.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.AutoRenewPeriod
member.summary: The duration for expiration time will extend every this many seconds. If there are insufficient funds, then it extends as long as possible. If it is empty when it expires, then it is deleted.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.LiveHashes
member.summary: All the livehashes attached to the account (each of which is a hash along with the keys that authorized it and can delete it)

member.name: F:AccountInfo.AccountMemo
member.summary: The memo associated with the account

member.name: F:AccountInfo.OwnedNfts
member.summary: The number of NFTs owned by this account

member.name: F:AccountInfo.MaxAutomaticTokenAssociations
member.summary: The maximum number of tokens that an Account can be implicitly associated with.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.AliasKey
member.summary: The public key which aliases to this account.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.LedgerId
member.summary: The ledger ID the response was returned from; please see HIP-198 for the network-specific IDs.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.EthereumNonce
member.summary: The ethereum transaction nonce associated with this account.

member.name: F:AccountInfo.HbarAllowances
member.summary: List of Hbar allowances

member.name: F:AccountInfo.TokenAllowances
member.summary: List of token allowances

member.name: F:AccountInfo.TokenNftAllowances
member.summary: List of NFT allowances

member.name: F:AccountInfo.StakingInfo
member.summary: Staking metadata for this account.
Constructor.
member.param: list of token id and token relationship records

member.name: M:AccountInfo.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Retrieve the account info from a protobuf byte array.
member.param: a byte array representing the protobuf
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:AccountInfo.FromProtobuf(Proto.CryptoGetInfoResponse.Types.AccountInfo)
member.summary: Retrieve the account info from a protobuf.

member.name: M:AccountInfo.ToBytes
member.summary: Extract a byte array representation.

member.name: M:AccountInfo.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Convert an account info object into a protobuf.
